name: mcp-server-mcpindex
description: Find MCP servers by natural-language task, with quality scores and advisory trust screens (check_tool_trust, assess_server) before an agent calls a tool.
long_description: The directory client for mcpindex.ai. Describe a task in plain language and get ranked MCP server picks with install commands and quality scores, then run an advisory trust screen on a server or tool before wiring it in. Zero-config: queries the public mcpindex.ai API, no credentials. Advisory only (REVIEW / UNVERIFIED at v1), not a safety verdict and not an in-path gate.

tools.name: recommend_mcp_for_task
tools.description: Recommend the best MCP servers for a natural-language task: ranked picks with reasoning, install commands, and quality scores.

tools.name: search_mcp_servers
tools.description: Keyword and semantic search across the full MCP server registry, with an optional category filter.

tools.name: get_install_command
tools.description: Get the exact install command for a given MCP server and client (Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Cline, Zed).

tools.name: compare_servers
tools.description: Side-by-side comparison of 2 to 5 MCP servers: quality scores, install paths, transport types, env vars.

tools.name: check_tool_trust
tools.description: Advisory pre-invocation trust screen for a specific tool on a server. Returns REVIEW or UNVERIFIED at v1; fail-closed, never coerces to ALLOW.

tools.name: assess_server
tools.description: Aggregated advisory trust assessment across all tools on a server. Same verdict shape as check_tool_trust.

api_base.title: API base URL
api_base.description: Override the mcpindex API base if you self-host. Leave as the default otherwise.
